TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Darren John Anderson Darren John Anderson htagan beh Edmonton,Alberta . hya ga hopa lalu nya myugi cinbwanan qani. qnxan ru pincyogan hiya yaba ga mrhuw semong pciriq hetay ru Jean Elizabeth Anderson ga wagiq tunux pcbaq,hiya ga htgan beh Edmonton. ptrang mrkyas qyanux,Anderson cinngasal ga pslhaw qsilq nya,musa pcbaq tuqi benan mari , mluw toqiy mama (Norm, Ullman 諾姆·厄爾曼) nya, hiya(Norm, Ullman) ga pinwagan blaqiy mari magal hopa lalu na squilq. ana ga hiya tuqi benan mari ini qsliq, hiya maki 18 kawas, taring pcbaq pale myugi maki Alberta Ballet pqwasan biru. hiya smoya balay pale. mopuw qeru kawas, Anderson wal magal hngawan na 'bagan pale maki Cyanata pale mzugi ru Royal Winnipeg pale mzyugi. ru tmwang Royal Winnipeg pale mzyugi magal wagiq na pila. maki pqwasan biru hiya ga spiyang na squilq. 1998 kawas, hiya wal masoq mqbaq qani lga, Aspirant na squilq ru kosi mzyugi na qutux pspung ryax, trang Arnold Spohr pcbaq hiya 繼續 psbnahun 培訓. kawas 1999, hiya tmwang Cincinnati Ballet , maki qasa, hiya tmwang cyugal pspung ryax.raral ga, hiya mqwas beh Amerika New York pale myugi 劇院 na 'bagan tqbaqan biru. 2002 kawas, Anderson musa Canada tmwang Royal Winnipeg Ballet , maki qasa hiya ga te sazing myugi psibay ru maki "The Nutcracker" psibay na Drosselmeyer mama ru "Puss in Boots" "穿靴子的貓" na ngyaw "Val Caniparoli's Cinderella" . qnxan nya Darren Anderson maki San Francisco, California . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *arren *oħn an*ers~ɕon *arren *oħn an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ e*monton,alβerta . ħja ɣa ħopa lalu nja mjuɣi ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani. qnxan ru pinʦ~ʨjoɣan ħija jaβa ɣa mrħuw s~ɕemoŋ pʦ~ʨiriq ħetaj ru *ean elizaβetħ an*ers~ɕon ɣa waɣiq tunux pʦ~ʨβaq,ħija ɣa ħtɣan βeħ e*monton. ptraŋ mrkjas~ɕ qjanux,an*ers~ɕon ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal ɣa ps~ɕlħaw qs~ɕilq nja,mus~ɕa pʦ~ʨβaq tuqi βenan mari , mluw toqij mama (norm, ullman ******) nja, ħija(norm, ullman) ɣa pinwaɣan βlaqij mari maɣal ħopa lalu na s~ɕquilq. ana ɣa ħija tuqi βenan mari ini qs~ɕliq, ħija maki ** kawas~ɕ, tariŋ pʦ~ʨβaq pale mjuɣi maki alβerta βallet pqwas~ɕan βiru. ħija s~ɕmoja βalaj pale. mopuw qeru kawas~ɕ, an*ers~ɕon wal maɣal ħŋawan na ʔβaɣan pale maki ʦ~ʨjanata pale mzuɣi ru rojal winnipeɣ pale mzjuɣi. ru tmwaŋ rojal winnipeɣ pale mzjuɣi maɣal waɣiq na pila. maki pqwas~ɕan βiru ħija ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ na s~ɕquilq. **** kawas~ɕ, ħija wal mas~ɕoq mqβaq qani lɣa, as~ɕpirant na s~ɕquilq ru kos~ɕi mzjuɣi na qutux ps~ɕpuŋ rjax, traŋ arnol* s~ɕpoħr pʦ~ʨβaq ħija ** ps~ɕβnaħun **. kawas~ɕ ****, ħija tmwaŋ ʦ~ʨinʦ~ʨinnati βallet , maki qas~ɕa, ħija tmwaŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal ps~ɕpuŋ rjax.raral ɣa, ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ amerika new jork pale mjuɣi ** na ʔβaɣan tqβaqan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ, an*ers~ɕon mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨana*a tmwaŋ rojal winnipeɣ βallet , maki qas~ɕa ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ mjuɣi ps~ɕiβaj ru maki "tħe nutʦ~ʨraʦ~ʨker" ps~ɕiβaj na *ros~ɕs~ɕelmejer mama ru "pus~ɕs~ɕ in βoots~ɕ" "*****" na ŋjaw "*al ʦ~ʨaniparoliʔs~ɕ ʦ~ʨin*erella" . qnxan nja *arren an*ers~ɕon maki s~ɕan *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo, ʦ~ʨali*ornia . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Darren John Anderson Darren John Anderson htagan beh Edmonton,Alberta . hya ga hopa lalu nya myugi cinbwanan qani. qnxan ru pincyogan hiya yaba ga mrhuw semong pciriq hetay ru Jean Elizabeth Anderson ga wagiq tunux pcbaq,hiya ga htgan beh Edmonton. ptrang mrkyas qyanux,Anderson cinngasal ga pslhaw qsilq nya,musa pcbaq tuqi benan mari , mluw toqiy mama (Norm, Ullman 諾姆·厄爾曼) nya, hiya(Norm, Ullman) ga pinwagan blaqiy mari magal hopa lalu na squilq. ana ga hiya tuqi benan mari ini qsliq, hiya maki 18 kawas, taring pcbaq pale myugi maki Alberta Ballet pqwasan biru. hiya smoya balay pale. mopuw qeru kawas, Anderson wal magal hngawan na 'bagan pale maki Cyanata pale mzugi ru Royal Winnipeg pale mzyugi. ru tmwang Royal Winnipeg pale mzyugi magal wagiq na pila. maki pqwasan biru hiya ga spiyang na squilq. 1998 kawas, hiya wal masoq mqbaq qani lga, Aspirant na squilq ru kosi mzyugi na qutux pspung ryax, trang Arnold Spohr pcbaq hiya 繼續 psbnahun 培訓. kawas 1999, hiya tmwang Cincinnati Ballet , maki qasa, hiya tmwang cyugal pspung ryax.raral ga, hiya mqwas beh Amerika New York pale myugi 劇院 na 'bagan tqbaqan biru. 2002 kawas, Anderson musa Canada tmwang Royal Winnipeg Ballet , maki qasa hiya ga te sazing myugi psibay ru maki "The Nutcracker" psibay na Drosselmeyer mama ru "Puss in Boots" "穿靴子的貓" na ngyaw "Val Caniparoli's Cinderella" . qnxan nya Darren Anderson maki San Francisco, California . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *arren *oħn an*ers~ɕon *arren *oħn an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ e*monton,alβerta . ħja ɣa ħopa lalu nja mjuɣi ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani. qnxan ru pinʦ~ʨjoɣan ħija jaβa ɣa mrħuw s~ɕemoŋ pʦ~ʨiriq ħetaj ru *ean elizaβetħ an*ers~ɕon ɣa waɣiq tunux pʦ~ʨβaq,ħija ɣa ħtɣan βeħ e*monton. ptraŋ mrkjas~ɕ qjanux,an*ers~ɕon ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal ɣa ps~ɕlħaw qs~ɕilq nja,mus~ɕa pʦ~ʨβaq tuqi βenan mari , mluw toqij mama (norm, ullman ******) nja, ħija(norm, ullman) ɣa pinwaɣan βlaqij mari maɣal ħopa lalu na s~ɕquilq. ana ɣa ħija tuqi βenan mari ini qs~ɕliq, ħija maki ** kawas~ɕ, tariŋ pʦ~ʨβaq pale mjuɣi maki alβerta βallet pqwas~ɕan βiru. ħija s~ɕmoja βalaj pale. mopuw qeru kawas~ɕ, an*ers~ɕon wal maɣal ħŋawan na ʔβaɣan pale maki ʦ~ʨjanata pale mzuɣi ru rojal winnipeɣ pale mzjuɣi. ru tmwaŋ rojal winnipeɣ pale mzjuɣi maɣal waɣiq na pila. maki pqwas~ɕan βiru ħija ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ na s~ɕquilq. **** kawas~ɕ, ħija wal mas~ɕoq mqβaq qani lɣa, as~ɕpirant na s~ɕquilq ru kos~ɕi mzjuɣi na qutux ps~ɕpuŋ rjax, traŋ arnol* s~ɕpoħr pʦ~ʨβaq ħija ** ps~ɕβnaħun **. kawas~ɕ ****, ħija tmwaŋ ʦ~ʨinʦ~ʨinnati βallet , maki qas~ɕa, ħija tmwaŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal ps~ɕpuŋ rjax.raral ɣa, ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ amerika new jork pale mjuɣi ** na ʔβaɣan tqβaqan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ, an*ers~ɕon mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨana*a tmwaŋ rojal winnipeɣ βallet , maki qas~ɕa ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ mjuɣi ps~ɕiβaj ru maki "tħe nutʦ~ʨraʦ~ʨker" ps~ɕiβaj na *ros~ɕs~ɕelmejer mama ru "pus~ɕs~ɕ in βoots~ɕ" "*****" na ŋjaw "*al ʦ~ʨaniparoliʔs~ɕ ʦ~ʨin*erella" . qnxan nja *arren an*ers~ɕon maki s~ɕan *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo, ʦ~ʨali*ornia . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
